Which is the best palindrome, each related to AI and/or SF?

If you recognize one of them, don't vote.

1: Now, Siri, deliver data deified at ad, reviled iris. Won!

2: Doge, tides, orb, trams; smart bros edit e-god.

3: Deliver live data on smart trams? No; a tad evil, reviled.
